sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67608" key="mhtrw/|zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μητρῴζω</orth>, <sense id="n67608.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">celebrate the festival of Cybele</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">142</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
